name: microsoft-sharepoint-mcp-frontier
title: Work IQ SharePoint
summary: Work IQ MCP server for Microsoft SharePoint operations. Learn more at https://aka.ms/AboutWorkIQ
description: Work IQ MCP server for Microsoft SharePoint operations. This feature is part of the Work IQ tools, providing shared work intelligence and actions for agents. Availability and capabilities are subject to change. Learn more: https://aka.ms/AboutWorkIQ

useCases.name: Find Site
useCases.description: Find SharePoint sites accessible to the user by name or list the top 20 sites.

useCases.name: Get Site By Path
useCases.description: Get a site using exact URL components. Use Find Site for name-based search.

useCases.name: List Subsites
useCases.description: List all child sites of a parent site.

useCases.name: Create List
useCases.description: Create a new list in a site with the first Name column. You can specify the list type.

useCases.name: List Lists
useCases.description: Get all lists in a site.

useCases.name: Delete List
useCases.description: Delete a list and all its items. This action cannot be undone.

useCases.name: Send Invites For List
useCases.description: Share a list with users with specified permissions.

useCases.name: Create List Item
useCases.description: Create a new item in a list. You can specify values for each column.

useCases.name: Update List Item
useCases.description: Update an item in a list. You can specify values for each column.

useCases.name: List List Items
useCases.description: Get all items from a list.

useCases.name: Delete List Item
useCases.description: Delete an item from a list. This action cannot be undone.

useCases.name: Create Column
useCases.description: Create a new column in a list with a specified type and properties.

useCases.name: Update Column
useCases.description: Update column properties or metadata.

useCases.name: List Columns
useCases.description: Get all columns from a list.

useCases.name: Delete Column
useCases.description: Delete a column from a list. This action removes all data in that column.

useCases.name: Find File or Folder
useCases.description: Search for files or folders by name.

useCases.name: Get Default Document Library In Site
useCases.description: Get the default document library for a site.

useCases.name: Get Folder Children
useCases.description: List items in a folder (up to 20 items).

useCases.name: Create Folder
useCases.description: Create a new folder. Automatically renames the folder if one with the same name already exists.

useCases.name: Create Small Text File
useCases.description: Create or upload a text file that is 5 MB or smaller.

useCases.name: Create Small Binary File
useCases.description: Create a binary file from base64 content that is 5 MB or smaller.

useCases.name: Read Small Text File
useCases.description: Download a text file that is 5 MB or smaller.

useCases.name: Read Small Binary File
useCases.description: Download a binary file ≤5 MB as base64-encoded content.

useCases.name: Get File or Folder Metadata
useCases.description: Get file or folder metadata by ID.

useCases.name: Get File or Folder Metadata by URL
useCases.description: Get file or folder metadata by sharing URL.

useCases.name: Delete File or Folder
useCases.description: Delete a file or folder.

useCases.name: Rename File or Folder
useCases.description: Rename a file or folder.

useCases.name: Move Small File
useCases.description: Move a file that is 5 MB or smaller within the same document library.

useCases.name: Share File or Folder
useCases.description: Share a file or folder with specified users and permissions.

useCases.name: Set Sensitivity Label on File
useCases.description: Apply or remove a sensitivity label on a file.

a365sharepointoauth2.description: Authenticate with Work IQ using OAuth2 authorization code flow with PKCE support.
